extension.description: Shows Cursor plan usage in the status bar: Total / First-party / API %, on-demand spend, and a usage dashboard.
config.title: Cursor Usage by tomippe
config.pollInterval.description: How often to refresh usage data (in minutes)
config.minimalMode.description: Show only the active metric: premium requests if not exhausted, or credits if premium is used up
config.usageDuration.description: Time range for the usage-by-model breakdown in the tooltip. Current Billing Cycle falls back to Last 30 Days when reset metadata is unavailable.
config.usageDuration.enumDesc.billingCyc: Current billing cycle (falls back to Last 30 Days when reset metadata is unavailable)
config.modelBreakdownSortBy.description: Sort column for the usage-by-model table.
config.modelBreakdownSortOrder.descripti: Sort direction for the usage-by-model table.
config.excludeZeroTokenModels.descriptio: Hide rows in the usage-by-model table where token usage is zero.
config.quotaAwareEventDisplay.descriptio: In the dashboard, show included usage as requests and on-demand usage as spend instead of showing raw request and spend values for every event.
